ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "work_class" TEXT /* Work class of the individual (e.g., Private, Government) */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level of the individual (e.g., HS-grad, Some-college) */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Number of years of education completed by the individual */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the individual (e.g., Widowed, Divorced, Separated) */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the individual (e.g., Exec-managerial, Machine-op-inspct) */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the individual (e.g., Not-in-family, Unmarried, Own-child) */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the individual (e.g., White, Black, Asian) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the individual (e.g., Female, Male) */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gain of the individual */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital loss of the individual */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Hours worked per week by the individual */,
  "native_country" TEXT /* Native country of the individual */,
  "income" TEXT /* Income level of the individual (e.g., <=50K, >50K) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., Survey, Census, Administrative Record) */,
  "data_source_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_capital_gain FOREIGN KEY ("capital_gain") REFERENCES capital_gains ("capital_gain"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_relationship FOREIGN KEY ("relationship") REFERENCES relationships ("relationship"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_native_country FOREIGN KEY ("native_country") REFERENCES native_countries ("native_country"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_capital_loss FOREIGN KEY ("capital_loss") REFERENCES capital_losses ("capital_loss"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_race FOREIGN KEY ("race") REFERENCES races ("race"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_hours_per_week FOREIGN KEY ("hours_per_week") REFERENCES work_hours ("work_hours"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_work_class FOREIGN KEY ("work_class") REFERENCES work_classes ("work_class"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_occupation FOREIGN KEY ("occupation") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_education FOREIGN KEY ("education") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_level"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_sex FOREIGN KEY ("sex") REFERENCES sexes ("sex"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_income FOREIGN KEY ("income") REFERENCES incomes ("income"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_marital_status FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_status")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Name of the education level (e.g., HS-grad, Some-college) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "education_group" TEXT /* Group of the education level (e.g., High School, College) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_classes" (
  "work_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work class */,
  "work_class" TEXT /* Name of the work class (e.g., Private, Government) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the work class */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the work class (e.g., Manufacturing, Services) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("work_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Name of the marital status (e.g., Widowed, Divorced, Separated) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marital status */,
  "marital_status_group" TEXT /* Group of the marital status (e.g., Married, Unmarried) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Name of the occupation (e.g., Exec-managerial, Machine-op-inspct) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  "occupation_group" TEXT /* Group of the occupation (e.g., Managerial, Technical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Name of the relationship (e.g., Not-in-family, Unmarried, Own-child) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship */,
  "relationship_group" TEXT /* Group of the relationship (e.g., Family, Non-family) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race" TEXT /* Name of the race (e.g., White, Black, Asian) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Name of the sex (e.g., Female, Male) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sex */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "native_countries" (
  "native_country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each native country */,
  "native_country" TEXT /* Name of the native country (e.g., United-States) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the native country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the native country (e.g., North America, Europe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("native_country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incomes" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income level */,
  "income" TEXT /* Name of the income level (e.g., <=50K, >50K) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the income level */,
  "income_group" TEXT /* Group of the income level (e.g., Low, High) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_hours" (
  "work_hour_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work hour */,
  "work_hours" INTEGER /* Number of hours worked per week */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the work hour */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("work_hour_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "capital_gains" (
  "capital_gain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each capital gain */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Amount of capital gain */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the capital gain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("capital_gain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "capital_losses" (
  "capital_loss_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each capital loss */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Amount of capital loss */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the capital loss */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("capital_loss_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., Survey, Census, Administrative Record) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collections" (
  "data_collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the data_sources table */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collections_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytical_results" (
  "analytical_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytical result */,
  "demographic_data_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the demographic_data table */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., regression, correlation) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the analytical result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytical_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytical_results_demographic_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "data_visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "analytical_result_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the analytical_results table */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, scatter plot) */,
  "visualization" TEXT /* Visualization of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_analytical_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("analytical_result_id") REFERENCES analytical_results ("analytical_result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_account_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user_accounts table */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the user accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time the user accessed the system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_account_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_account_id")
)
